findings.evidence: `rg` hits: lines 58-61 contain `show D.toSubmodule ≤ D.toSubmodule ⊔ E.toSubmodule from le_sup_left` and the analogous right-hand `show`.
findings.fix: Replace these with explicit arguments to `tensorSquare_range_mono`, e.g. pass `(P := D.toSubmodule) (Q := D.toSubmodule ⊔ E.toSubmodule) le_sup_left`, or add a short comment explaining why the cast is unavoidable.
findings.issue: `comul_mem_sup` uses undocumented `show ... ≤ ... from le_sup_left/right` casts to make the tensor-square monotonicity calls typecheck.

summary: The join API mostly uses clear lattice/submodule facts, but the comultiplication proof contains undocumented `show` casts, which this rubric treats as brittle proof plumbing.
